stemHtml: The engine fuel control unit (FCU) is protected from damage by debris by…

options.a: magnetic plugs located at various positions throughout the fuel supply usually at the outlet of fuel pumps and valves.
options.b: strainers at the inlet to the low-pressure fuel pumps.
options.c: a fine filter located prior to the high-pressure fuel pump at the inlet to the fuel control unit.
options.d: the fine filter located between the high-pressure fuel pump and the governor unit.
